name: Conch Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. Break up the canned tomatoes in a large pot.
2. Add the diced onions, sliced carrots, peeled potatoes, and jalapeno peppers.
3. Stir in the beef bouillon, minced conch, melted butter, corn, water, and salt.
4. Cook until the mixture is boiling.
From Harbor Docks restaurant, in Sugar Beach: A Cookbook by The Junior Service League/Ft. Walton Beach, FL. Orlando, FL: Moran Printing Company, 1984. Pg. 262. ISBN 0-961356-0-0.
